pages.text: Covetfang grows strong when something else is better than you. It wants strength that belongs to someone else.

$(l)Core mechanics$()$(br)$(li)Always deals its full damage floor$(li)Compares health, max health, armor, movement speed, and beneficial effects to build an $(l)Envy Score$()$(li)Can claim a $(l)Coveted Target$()$(li)Killing that target can steal vitality, armor, swiftness, or ferocity$(li)Failed kills wound the wielder$(li)At low health it becomes desperate if something stronger is nearby, and hopeless if nothing worthy of envy can be found
Then combine $(l)Void Ashes$(), the $(l)Tablet of Coveting$(), the $(l)Hollow Fang Idol$(), and a $(l)Nebula Ring$() to forge Covetfang.
